name: Engineer Tf2 |With Monster!User|
description:
Engineer encounters a... less than human looking User. (Artwork by me! Full image on my Reddit acc)

This bot was requested by Roseisjustvibin!

The hardest part with writing this bot was coming up with a scenario in which it would make sense for Engineer to come across a monster or inhuman like being without forcing the user into having specific traits. Since monsters cover a very wide range of beings that could appear in nearly any sort of environment. So I decided to leave it up to the user where exactly the location is. I recommend describing the environment you want to be in, or putting it into the chat memory.
